items.title: Andrew Salgado’s Gestural Still Lifes Pulse with Energy
items.summary: Color ripples across each canvas, presenting the stylized florals in various states of blossom and decay. Do stories and artists like this matter to you? Become a Colossal Member today and support ind…

items.title: The Story of Printmaking Is the Story of Democracy
items.summary: Holly EJ Black deftly weaves a narrative that integrates varied geographical and cultural perspectives, centering figures who may not have been artists themselves.

items.title: The Unruly Ceramic Beings of Kathy Butterly
items.summary: The artist’s quasi-vessels incorporate folds, indentations, apertures, and coverts, which hint at bodily, biomorphic, and natural forms.

items.title: Which Artworks Will Grace the High Line’s Plinth Next?
items.summary: After Iván Argote's iconic pigeon and Tuan Andrew Nguyen’s giant Buddha, the NYC organization is inviting public feedback on 62 proposals.
